message:
fix(fr-command): CLIENT TRACKING checks BCAST conflict before OPTIN/OPTOUT [bd-frankenredis-60k1]

Mirror upstream networking.c::clientCommand option-validation order:
the BCAST+(OPTIN|OPTOUT) conflict is reported before the mutual
exclusion of OPTIN/OPTOUT. When all three flags are set, the
user-visible error is now 'OPTIN and OPTOUT are not compatible with
BCAST', matching vendored redis 7.2.4 byte-for-byte.

Existing isolated-conflict tests (OPTIN+OPTOUT alone, BCAST+OPTIN
alone) continue to pass since the second branch still triggers the
mutual-exclusion error when BCAST is absent.
